title: Vesmir: Tools and Ores
description: Unleash your inner miner and embark on a legendary quest through towering peaks, fiery depths, and enchanted forests to unearth rare ores, forge powerful tools, and become the ultimate master of your Minecraft world!
body:
# Overview
Embark on an adventure of epic proportions in a Minecraft mod that redefines the art of mining! With a focus on enhancing the mining experience, this mod introduces a plethora of new ores, tools, and armors to discover and master. Journey to the towering peaks of sky-high mountains to unearth the ethereal Celestite ore, or brave the fiery depths of the Nether to harvest the potent Infernal Essence. Each rare ore offers unique properties and crafting opportunities, enticing players to explore new heights and depths in their quest for riches and power.

Venture into the mystical Feywood biome, where magic and mystery intertwine amidst lush forests and shimmering glades. Explore this enchanted realm and uncover its secrets as you gather resources and forge powerful equipment.

But the true challenge lies in mastering the art of mining itself. Progress through the mod by honing your mining skills and collecting vast quantities of ores to craft Void tools and armors, the ultimate prizes of your mining journey. These legendary items, crafted from a combination of all other ores, grant unmatched power and versatility to those who possess them.

With its focus on mining lore and adventure, this mod offers a fresh and exciting gameplay experience for Minecraft players seeking new challenges and rewards beneath the surface.

# Items
- **Ancient Essence Ore**: A mystical ore infused with the power of ancient beings, used to craft powerful tools and armor.
- **Infernal Essence Ore**: A fiery ore that burns with the essence of the Nether, perfect for crafting durable weapons and armor.
- **Fire Elemental Crystal Ore**: A vibrant crystal that embodies the strength of fire elementals, ideal for crafting heat-resistant gear.
- **Water Elemental Crystal Ore**: A shimmering crystal that channels the essence of water elementals, enhancing tools with fluid agility.
- **Air Elemental Crystal Ore**: A light and ethereal crystal that grants swiftness, perfect for crafting agile gear.
- **Earth Elemental Crystal Ore**: A sturdy crystal representing earth elementals, used to forge resilient tools and armor.
- **Mortalite Ore**: A rare ore that embodies the spirit of mortal races, used for versatile crafting.
- **Feywood**: A magical wood harvested from the Fey Forest, known for its enchanting properties and durability.
- **Monstrous Bone Ore**: A tough bone from monstrous creatures, ideal for crafting formidable weapons and armor.
- **Celestite Ore**: A radiant ore that sparkles with celestial energy, used to create powerful tools and items.
- **Shard of Void Ore**: A mysterious shard that draws power from the void, enabling the crafting of unique and potent gear.
- **Void Crystal**: The item to rule them all.

  *All the ores have their respective tools and armours*

# Biomes
- **Fey Forest**: A magical land where trees are infused with magical power and was once known to be inhabited by Fey creatures.






For best experience and reduced difficulty, set world type to "AMPLIFIED".
This mod is designed to enhance the mining adventure and experience of the player.



Credits: [lcs128x](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lcs128x/projects) (textures)
